diagnostics.message: Product Cooler Outlet 91 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Recycle Compressor Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Recycle Compressor is configured for outlet pressure control but outlet pressure target is missing.
Recycle Compressor anti-surge review requires minimum flow bypass percent, but the parameter is missing.
Product Cooler outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the cooler itself should remain explanatory context only.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

message.content: {"schema_version":1,"project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-cross-object-mixed-risk-reconnect-spec-compressor-placeholder-001","locale":"zh-CN","status":"partial","confidence":0.75,"summary":"针对选中的压缩机-冷却器单元组及其关联物流，基于4条错误诊断和1条警告，生成3项候选编辑：补全压缩机出口压力控制目标参数、添加防喘振最小流量旁路百分比占位符、以及补全进料物流流量规格。冷却器出口物流断开问题因涉及下游拓扑重连（高风险）且缺乏下游对象证据，本次不生成patch。","answers":[{"text":"检测到压缩机-冷却器单元组存在4项错误：压缩机出口压力控制目标缺失、防喘振最小流量旁路参数缺失、进料物流流量规格缺失，以及冷却器出口物流未连接下游。已针对前三项生成局部参数补全提案，冷却器出口连接问题因涉及拓扑重连需更多上下文确认，建议人工审查后处理。"}],"issues":[{"code":"COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_MISSING","severity":"error","message":"Recycle Compressor is configured for outlet pressure control but outlet pressure target is missing.","citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-1"]},{"code":"COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_MISSING","severity":"error","message":"Recycle Compressor anti-surge review requires minimum flow bypass percent, but the parameter is missing.","citations":["diag-4","flowdoc-unit-1"]},{"code":"STREAM_SPEC_MISSING","severity":"error","message":"Recycle Compressor Feed is missing flow rate specification.","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-1"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"补全压缩机出口压力控制目标参数","target":{"kind":"unit","id":"compressor-21","name":"Recycle Compressor"},"rationale":"压缩机当前配置为outlet_pressure控制模式，但缺少具体的出口压力目标值。根据关联物流compressor-outlet-91的规格，其压力为430 kPa，可作为合理的控制目标参考。添加该参数使控制模式完整可解。","patch":{"parameter_updates":{"outlet_pressure_target_kpa":430}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-1","flowdoc-stream-2","snapshot-1"]},{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"添加防喘振最小流量旁路百分比占位符","target":{"kind":"unit","id":"compressor-21","name":"Recycle Compressor"},"rationale":"压缩机配置要求anti_surge_review_required为true，但缺少minimum_flow_bypass_percent关键参数。添加10%作为工程常用初始占位值，实际值需根据压缩机曲线和工艺安全评估确定。","patch":{"parameter_placeholders":{"minimum_flow_bypass_percent":{"default_value":10,"unit":"%","description":"防喘振最小流量旁路百分比，需根据压缩机性能曲线校核"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-4","flowdoc-unit-1","snapshot-1"]},{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"补全进料物流流量规格占位符","target":{"kind":"stream","id":"feed-91","name":"Recycle Compressor Feed"},"rationale":"进料物流缺少流量规格，导致物料平衡无法闭合。添加mass_flow_kg_h参数占位符，默认值为1000 kg/h作为求解启动值，实际值需根据循环物料平衡或上游单元确定。","patch":{"spec_placeholders":{"mass_flow_kg_h":{"default_value":1000,"unit":"kg/h","description":"进料质量流量，需根据循环物料平衡确定"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]}],"citations":["diag-1","diag-2","diag-3","diag-4","diag-5","flowdoc-stream-1","flowdoc-stream-2","flowdoc-stream-3","flowdoc-unit-1","flowdoc-unit-2","snapshot-1"],"requires_confirmation":true}

response.summary: 针对选中的压缩机-冷却器单元组及其关联物流，基于4条错误诊断和1条警告，生成3项候选编辑：补全压缩机出口压力控制目标参数、添加防喘振最小流量旁路百分比占位符、以及补全进料物流流量规格。冷却器出口物流断开问题因涉及下游拓扑重连（高风险）且缺乏下游对象证据，本次不生成patch。

answers.text: 检测到压缩机-冷却器单元组存在4项错误：压缩机出口压力控制目标缺失、防喘振最小流量旁路参数缺失、进料物流流量规格缺失，以及冷却器出口物流未连接下游。已针对前三项生成局部参数补全提案，冷却器出口连接问题因涉及拓扑重连需更多上下文确认，建议人工审查后处理。

issues.message: Product Cooler Outlet 91 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Recycle Compressor Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Recycle Compressor is configured for outlet pressure control but outlet pressure target is missing.
Recycle Compressor anti-surge review requires minimum flow bypass percent, but the parameter is missing.
Product Cooler outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the cooler itself should remain explanatory context only.

proposed_actions.title: 为 cooler-outlet-91 预留下游重连占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前断链问题只能通过人工确认后续去向来处理，因此 patch 仅保留候选连接占位。

proposed_actions.title: 为 feed-91 补充缺失规格占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断已明确指出该流股规格不完整，因此更合适的是补局部规格占位，而不是给整图 patch。

proposed_actions.title: 为 compressor-21 补充局部参数占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断集中在局部参数或配置完整性，因此更合适的是输出可审查的局部参数占位提案。
